Yang Bo ś•äŚłõ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Bo (ś•äŚłõ). A subordinate to Li Jue, plotted his death but was killed by him for a different matter. Yang Bo was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Li Jue.
